ast.name: innerText
ast.source: (disabled; enable in settings)
ast.target: （已禁用；在设置中启用）

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If enabled, Dataview will automatically append tasks with their completion date when they are checked in Dataview views.
ast.target: 启用后，当任务在 Dataview 视图中被勾选时，Dataview 会自动附加完成日期。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Example with default field name and date format: - [x] my task [completion:: 2022-01-01]
ast.target: 使用默认字段名和日期格式的示例：- [x] my task [completion:: 2022-01-01]

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Example: - [x] my task ✅ 2022-01-01

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Disable this to customize the completion date format or field name, or to use Dataview inline field formatting.
ast.target: 禁用此项以自定义完成日期格式或字段名，或使用 Dataview 内联字段格式。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Only available when "automatic task completion tracking" is enabled.
ast.target: 仅在启用“自动任务完成跟踪”时可用。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Text used as inline field key for task completion date when toggling a task's checkbox in a Dataview view.
ast.target: 在 Dataview 视图中切换任务复选框时，用作任务完成日期内联字段键的文本。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Couldn't convert value into a JSON string:
ast.target: 无法将值转换为 JSON 字符串：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable or disable executing regular inline Dataview queries.
ast.target: 启用或禁用执行常规内联 Dataview 查询。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable or disable executing DataviewJS queries.
ast.target: 启用或禁用执行 DataviewJS 查询。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable or disable executing inline DataviewJS queries. Requires that DataviewJS queries are enabled.
ast.target: 启用或禁用执行内联 DataviewJS 查询。需要已启用 DataviewJS 查询。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables or disables visual highlighting / pretty rendering for inline fields in reading view.
ast.target: 在阅读视图中启用或禁用内联字段的高亮显示/美化渲染。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables or disables visual highlighting / pretty rendering for inline fields in Live Preview.
ast.target: 在实时预览中启用或禁用内联字段的高亮显示/美化渲染。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keyword for DataviewJS blocks. Defaults to 'dataviewjs'. Reload required for changes to take effect.
ast.target: DataviewJS 块的关键字。默认为 'dataviewjs'。更改后需重新加载才能生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, inline queries will also be evaluated inside full code blocks.
ast.target: 如果启用，内联查询也会在完整代码块中被执行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If toggled off, the small number in the result header of TASK and TABLE queries will be hidden.
ast.target: 如果关闭，TASK 和 TABLE 查询结果标题中的小数字将被隐藏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, queries which return 0 results will render a warning message.
ast.target: 如果启用，返回 0 条结果的查询将显示警告消息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What null/non-existent should show up as in tables, by default. This supports Markdown notation.
ast.target: 表格中默认显示 null/不存在值的内容。支持 Markdown 语法。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to wait (in milliseconds) for files to stop changing before updating views.
ast.target: 在更新视图前等待文件停止变更的时间（毫秒）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the default ID column in tables; this is the auto-generated first column that links to the source file.
ast.target: 表格中默认 ID 列的名称；这是自动生成的第一列，链接到源文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only available when "automatic task completion tracking" is enabled.
ast.target: 仅在启用“自动任务完成跟踪”时可用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, completing a task in a Dataview will automatically complete its subtasks too.
ast.target: 启用后，在 Dataview 中完成任务会自动完成其子任务。

ast.source: Automatic task completion tracking
ast.target: 自动任务完成跟踪

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Completion date format

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Recursive sub-task completion
ast.target: 递归子任务完成

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cache metadata about files and sections in the dataview index.
ast.target: 缓存 dataview 索引中文件和区段的元数据。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Quoted field unterminated
ast.target: 引号字段未终止

ast.name: message
ast.source: Trailing quote on quoted field is malformed
ast.target: 带引号字段的结尾引号格式错误

ast.name: message
ast.source: Dataview: No results to show for task query.
ast.target: Dataview：任务查询无可显示结果。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Dataview: No results to show for list query.
ast.target: Dataview：列表查询无可显示结果。

ast.target: Dataview：没有可显示的表格查询结果。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Force refresh all views and blocks
ast.target: 强制刷新所有视图和块

ast.name: name
ast.source: Drop all cached file metadata
ast.target: 清除所有缓存的文件元数据

ast.name: name
ast.source: Rebuild current view
ast.target: 重建当前视图

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Previous Month
ast.target: 上个月

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Next Month
ast.target: 下个月

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Warn on empty result
ast.target: 警告空结果

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use emoji shorthand for completion
ast.target: 使用表情符号缩写来完成

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The prefix to inline queries (to mark them as Dataview queries). Defaults to '='.
ast.target: 内联查询的前缀（用于标记它们为Dataview查询）。默认为"="。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If enabled, will use emoji shorthand instead of inline field formatting to fill out implicit task field "completion".
ast.target: 如果启用，将使用表情符号缩写代替内联字段格式来填写隐含任务字段“完成”。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Only available when "automatic task completion tracking" is enabled and "use emoji shorthand for completion" is disabled.
ast.target: 仅当“自动任务完成跟踪”已启用且“使用表情符号缩写表示完成”已禁用时可用。

ast.name: error
ast.source: remove-markdown encountered error: %s
ast.target: remove-markdown遇到错误：%s

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The prefix to JavaScript inline queries (to mark them as DataviewJS queries). Defaults to '$='.
ast.target: JavaScript内联查询的前缀（用于标记它们为DataviewJS查询）。默认为'$='。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only available when "automatic task completion tracking" is enabled and "use emoji shorthand for completion" is disabled.
ast.target: 仅当“自动任务完成跟踪”已启用且“使用表情符号缩写表示完成”已禁用时可用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
If enabled, views will automatically refresh when files in your vault change; this can negatively affect" +
            " some functionality like embeds in views, so turn it off if such functionality is not working.
ast.target: 如果启用，当您的保险库中的文件发生变化时，视图将自动刷新；这可能会对视图中的嵌入等功能产生负面影响，因此如果此类功能不正常工作，请将其关闭。

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, views will automatically refresh when files in your vault change; this can negatively affect"+" some functionality like embeds in views, so turn it off if such functionality is not working.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，当您的保险库中的文件更改时，视图将自动刷新；这可能会对视图中的嵌入等功能产生负面影响，因此如果此类功能不正常工作，请将其关闭。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The default date format (see Luxon date format options)."+" Currently: "+DateTime.now().toFormat(this.plugin.settings.defaultDateFormat,{locale:currentLocale()}))
regex.target: .setDesc("默认日期格式（查看Luxon日期格式选项）。"+" 当前： "+DateTime.now().toFormat(this.plugin.settings.defaultDateFormat,{locale:currentLocale()}))

regex.source: .setDesc("The default date format (see Luxon date format options)."+" Currently: "+DateTime.now().toFormat(value,{locale:currentLocale()}))
regex.target: .setDesc("默认日期格式（查看Luxon日期格式选项）。"+" 当前： "+DateTime.now().toFormat(value,{locale:currentLocale()}))

regex.source: .setDesc("The default date and time format (see Luxon date format options)."+" Currently: "+DateTime.now().toFormat(this.plugin.settings.defaultDateTimeFormat,{locale:currentLocale()}))
regex.target: .setDesc("默认日期和时间格式（查看Luxon日期格式选项）。"+" 当前： "+DateTime.now().toFormat(this.plugin.settings.defaultDateTimeFormat,{locale:currentLocale()}))

regex.source: .setDesc("The default date and time format (see Luxon date format options)."+" Currently: "+DateTime.now().toFormat(value,{locale:currentLocale()}))
regex.target: .setDesc("默认日期和时间格式（查看Luxon日期格式选项）。"+" 当前： "+DateTime.now().toFormat(value,{locale:currentLocale()}))

regex.source: .setDesc("The name of the default ID column in tables, when the table is on grouped data; this is the auto-generated first column"+"that links to the source file/group.")
regex.target: .setDesc("表中默认的ID列名称，当表处于分组数据状态时；这是自动生成的第一个列，用于链接到源文件/分组。")
